redFlags.correctResponse_en: That is not correct if the procedure is covered. The PhilHealth portion should first be processed through direct filing and we should only pay the remaining co-pay.

They are a PhilHealth member and the official 2025 procedure case rate for myomectomy is ₱45,435 for the abdominal approach and ₱35,100 for the vaginal approach. May we confirm the final approach in the chart and begin direct filing using the MDR, CF1, and CF2?

redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Magkaiba po ang official Annex B amount depende sa approach. Pakicheck po kung abdominal o vaginal ang final procedure para tama ang package na ma-file.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: The official Annex B amount differs depending on the approach. Please check whether the final procedure is abdominal or vaginal so the correct package is filed.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Bayad muna kayo ng buong bill bago namin i-apply ang PhilHealth.

redFlags.correctResponse_en: That is not correct if the procedure is covered. The PhilHealth-covered portion should first be direct filed based on the final surgical approach before we are charged the remaining co-pay.

Handa na po ang aming Operative Report o surgical order, MDR, CF1, at CF2. Pwede po bang simulan ang pag-process?
ABDOMINAL_HYSTERECTOMY.billingScript_en: Good day. The patient is [name], scheduled or admitted for total abdominal hysterectomy. They are a PhilHealth member and the official 2025 procedure case rate for covered total abdominal hysterectomy is ₱58,500 under direct filing. Our Operative Report or surgical order, MDR, CF1, and CF2 are ready. May we begin processing?

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Hindi namin ma-aapply ang PhilHealth dahil major surgery ito.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: We cannot apply PhilHealth because this is a major surgery.

redFlags.correctResponse_en: There is an official PhilHealth Annex B procedure case rate for covered total abdominal hysterectomy. Please check the encoded procedure and start direct filing for the covered portion.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Bayad muna kayo ng buong surgical bill bago namin ibawas ang PhilHealth.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: Pay the full surgical bill first before we deduct PhilHealth.

ABDOMINAL_HYSTERECTOMY.malasakitNote_fil: Bilang NHTS/Indigent member, puwedeng makatulong ang Malasakit Center sa natitirang co-pay ng abdominal hysterectomy.

OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.billingScript_fil: Magandang araw po. Ang pasyente ay si [pangalan] at gusto naming gamitin ang PhilHealth Outpatient Mental Health Services package. Paki-confirm po kung contracted ang facility ninyo para sa package na ito at kung General o Specialty package ang ilalagay sa record.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.billingScript_en: Good day. The patient is [name] and we would like to use the PhilHealth Outpatient Mental Health Services package. Please confirm that your facility is contracted for this package and whether the record will use the General or Specialty package.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Consult lang ito kaya wala kaming PhilHealth package para rito.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: This is only a consult so we do not have a PhilHealth package for it.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: May official PhilHealth outpatient mental health package po. Paki-check lang po kung contracted ang facility ninyo para rito at kung anong package level ang applicable.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: There is an official PhilHealth outpatient mental health package. Please check whether your facility is contracted for it and which package level applies.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Hindi namin alam kung general o specialty package ang gagamitin.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: We do not know whether to use the general or specialty package.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Pwede po bang i-check ang diagnosis, age criteria, at treatment plan para maitugma sa tamang PhilHealth package bago kami i-bill?
redFlags.correctResponse_en: Can you check the diagnosis, age criteria, and treatment plan so it can be matched to the correct PhilHealth package before we are billed?

OHAT.billingScript_fil: Magandang araw po. Ang pasyente ay si [pangalan] at gagamitin sana namin ang PhilHealth OHAT package. Paki-confirm po kung DOH-designated at PhilHealth-accredited OHAT hub o satellite hub kayo at kung General o Specialized package ang tama para sa edad ng pasyente.
OHAT.billingScript_en: Good day. The patient is [name] and we would like to use the PhilHealth OHAT package. Please confirm that you are a DOH-designated and PhilHealth-accredited OHAT hub or satellite hub and whether the correct package for the patient’s age is General or Specialized.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Sa regular clinic lang ito at wala kaming OHAT processing.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: This is only handled in a regular clinic and we do not process OHAT.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Naiintindihan ko po. Pakicheck lang po kung accredited kayong OHAT hub o satellite hub. Kung hindi, kailangan naming malaman kung saang designated hub dapat pumunta para magamit ang PhilHealth package.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: I understand. Please check whether you are an accredited OHAT hub or satellite hub. If not, we need to know which designated hub we should go to so the PhilHealth package can be used.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Pareho lang ang package amount ng adult at pediatric OHAT.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: The adult and pediatric OHAT package amounts are the same.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Magkaiba po ang official package amount ng General at Specialized OHAT. Pakicheck po ang age-based eligibility at final package na ilalagay sa claim record.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: The official package amount differs between General and Specialized OHAT. Please check the age-based eligibility and the final package that will be entered in the claim record.

ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.billingScript_fil: Magandang araw po. Ang pasyente ay si [pangalan] at gusto naming gamitin ang PhilHealth Animal Bite Treatment Package. Paki-confirm po kung accredited bite center kayo at kung ang case ay pasok sa covered rabies exposure category para magamit ang package na ₱5,850.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.billingScript_en: Good day. The patient is [name] and we would like to use the PhilHealth Animal Bite Treatment Package. Please confirm that you are an accredited bite center and that the case falls under a covered rabies exposure category so the PHP 5,850 package can be used.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Cash basis lang ang rabies package dito at wala kaming PhilHealth deduction.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: The rabies package here is cash basis only and we do not deduct PhilHealth.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Kung accredited animal bite treatment center po kayo, may official PhilHealth Animal Bite Treatment Package. Pakicheck po ang accreditation at covered exposure category bago kami singilin ng full amount.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: If you are an accredited animal bite treatment center, there is an official PhilHealth Animal Bite Treatment Package. Please check the accreditation and the covered exposure category before charging us the full amount.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Simple bite lang iyan kaya hindi puwede sa package.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: That is only a simple bite so it cannot use the package.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Pakicheck po ang documented exposure category. Ang package ay may malinaw na covered categories gaya ng Category III, repeat exposure, at ilang Category II head and neck cases.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: Please check the documented exposure category. The package has clear covered categories such as Category III, repeat exposure, and some Category II head and neck cases.

NEWBORN.billingScript_fil: Magandang araw po. Ang sanggol ni [pangalan ng ina] ay na-admit para sa Newborn Care Package. Ang ina ay PhilHealth member at ang Newborn Care Package ay covered ng ₱1,750 sa lahat ng antas ng ospital para sa normal newborn care. Ito ay direct filing case. Mayroon po kaming MDR ng ina, Certificate of Live Birth ng sanggol, CF1, at CF2. Pwede po bang simulan ang pag-process?
NEWBORN.billingScript_en: Good day. The newborn of [mother's name] was admitted for the Newborn Care Package. The mother is a PhilHealth member and the Newborn Care Package is covered at ₱1,750 at all hospital levels for normal newborn care. This is a direct filing case. We have the mother's MDR, baby's Certificate of Live Birth, CF1, and CF2. May we begin processing?

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Bayad muna kayo para sa newborn — hiwalay ang bayad sa ina.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: Pay separately for the newborn — the baby's charges are separate from the mother.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Naiintindihan ko po na hiwalay ang claim ng sanggol, pero ang PhilHealth portion ng Newborn Care Package ay dapat i-file ng direkta ng ospital sa PhilHealth. Hindi po dapat kolektahin sa amin ang covered portion bago mag-discharge. Kami lamang ang magbabayad ng co-pay.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: I understand the newborn has a separate claim, but the PhilHealth portion of the Newborn Care Package must be filed directly by the hospital to PhilHealth. The covered portion should not be collected from us before discharge. We only pay the co-pay.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Ang inyong doktor ay hindi accredited sa PhilHealth.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: Your doctor is not accredited with PhilHealth.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Kung hindi accredited ang aming doktor, ang professional fee ay hindi mako-cover ng PhilHealth. Pwede po bang i-check kung may accredited na doktor sa ospital na available para sa aming kaso? O pwede rin po kaming magtanong sa PhilHealth coordinator.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: If our doctor is not PhilHealth-accredited, the professional fee will not be covered. Can you check if there is an accredited doctor available for our case? We can also ask the PhilHealth coordinator.

redFlags.wrongStatement_fil: Kailangan namin ng guarantee letter bago namin simulan ang treatment.
redFlags.wrongStatement_en: We need a guarantee letter before we can start treatment.
redFlags.correctResponse_fil: Ayon sa 2026 national budget law, ang guarantee letters ay ipinagbawal na. Hindi na ito kailangan para sa PhilHealth coverage. Ang aming PhilHealth MDR at CF1/CF2 ay sapat na. Kung hindi kayo sigurado, pwede kaming makipag-usap sa PhilHealth coordinator ng ospital.
redFlags.correctResponse_en: Under the 2026 national budget law, guarantee letters have been banned. They are no longer required for PhilHealth coverage. Our PhilHealth MDR and CF1/CF2 are sufficient. If unsure, we can speak with the hospital's PhilHealth coordinator.

NEWBORN.malasakitNote_fil: Bilang NHTS/Indigent member, maaaring matugunan ng Malasakit Center ang co-pay para sa Newborn Care Package.
NEWBORN.malasakitNote_en: As an NHTS/Indigent member, the Malasakit Center may cover the co-pay for the Newborn Care Package.
